titles.title: My Peace I Give Unto You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My peace I give unto you, It's the peace that the world cannot give; It's the peace that the world cannot understand; Peace to know, peace to show, My peace I give unto you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My love I give unto you, It's the love that the world cannot give; It's the love that the world cannot understand; Love to know, love to show, My love I give unto you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My joy I give unto you, It's the joy that the world cannot give; It's the joy that the world cannot understand; Joy to know, joy to show, My joy I give unto you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My faith I give unto you, It's the faith that the world cannot give; It's the faith that the world cannot understand; Faith to know, faith to show, My faith I give unto you.
